series_metadata.series_description: The Self Insured Employers Financial Reports consist of certified audited financial documents and annual reports sent to BWC by the Self Insured Companies. The Self Insured Employers Financial Reports contain highly sensitive financial information about the Self-Insured Employers. The Self Insured Employers Financial Reports are scanned into the Universal Document Service (UDS). The Universal Document Service (UDS) is an imaging concept that stores any type of electronic file, such as Microsoft Office documents, Adobe Acrobat, audio/video, Computer Aided Design (CAD), etc. as well as scanned images.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: Provided previous year’s annual report has been received from companies, Self Insured Employers Financial Reports in Self Insured Unit , and ; Electronic: Scan Self Insured Employers Financial Reports into UDS and verify quality assurance.
